channel.title: GitHub Swift Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Swift in GitHub

item.title: nikitabobko/AeroSpace
item.description: AeroSpace is an i3-like tiling window manager for macOS

item.title: whoeevee/EeveeSpotify
item.description: A tweak to get Spotify Premium for free, just like Spotilife

item.title: iina/iina
item.description: The modern video player for macOS.

item.title: SwiftUIX/SwiftUIX
item.description: An exhaustive expansion of the standard SwiftUI library.

item.title: apple/swift-algorithms
item.description: Commonly used sequence and collection algorithms for Swift

item.title: Whisky-App/Whisky
item.description: A modern Wine wrapper for macOS built with SwiftUI

item.title: RevenueCat/purchases-ios
item.description: In-app purchases and subscriptions made easy. Support for iOS, watchOS, tvOS, macOS, and visionOS.

item.title: Alamofire/Alamofire
item.description: Elegant HTTP Networking in Swift

item.title: TelegramMessenger/Telegram-iOS
item.description: Telegram-iOS

item.title: exyte/PopupView
item.description: Toasts and popups library written with SwiftUI

item.title: Aidoku/Aidoku
item.description: Free and open source manga reader for iOS and iPadOS

item.title: pmusolino/Wormholy
item.description: iOS network debugging, like a wizard 🧙‍♂️

item.title: MrKai77/Loop
item.description: Window management made elegant.

item.title: mozilla-mobile/firefox-ios
item.description: Firefox for iOS

item.title: groue/GRDB.swift
item.description: A toolkit for SQLite databases, with a focus on application development

item.title: signalapp/Signal-iOS
item.description: A private messenger for iOS.

item.title: kodecocodes/swift-algorithm-club
item.description: Algorithms and data structures in Swift, with explanations!

item.title: gonzalezreal/swift-markdown-ui
item.description: Display and customize Markdown text in SwiftUI

item.title: pointfreeco/swift-composable-architecture
item.description: A library for building applications in a consistent and understandable way, with composition, testing, and ergonomics in mind.

item.title: utmapp/UTM
item.description: Virtual machines for iOS and macOS

item.title: quoid/userscripts
item.description: An open-source userscript manager for Safari
